_comment: Celebrations for logging streaks (consecutive days with a purchase logged). {n} is the streak length in days. The app picks the highest tier whose 'minDays' the streak meets, then a line at random.

lines: {n} days in a row — a habit is forming!
Two days and counting. Keep it rolling.
A full week logged — {n} days straight!
Seven days strong. This is what consistency looks like.
{n}-day streak. You’ve turned it into a routine.
{n} days without missing a beat — remarkable.
A whole month of logging. You’ve mastered the habit.
{n} days. One hundred and counting — legendary.
Triple digits! {n} days of showing up.
{n}-day streak. Few ever get here. You did.
